channel.title: Patchstack — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Patchstack (patchstack).

item.title: CVE-2026-42653 · 7.1 HIGH 💥 🌩️ — WordPress SliceWP plugin <= 1.2.6 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in iova.Mihai SliceWP allows Stored XSS. This issue affects SliceWP: from n/a through 1.2.6.

item.title: CVE-2026-39494 · 9.3 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️ — WordPress Product Filter by WBW plugin <= 3.1.2 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in WBW Plugins Product Filter by WBW allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects Product Filter by WBW: from n/a through 3.1.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-42647 · 9.3 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️ — WordPress JoomSport plugin <= 5.7.7 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Beardev JoomSport allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects JoomSport: from n/a through 5.7.7.

item.title: CVE-2026-49060 · 9.8 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️ — WordPress Hippoo Mobile App for WooCommerce plugin <= 1.9.4 - Privilege Escalation vulnerability
item.description: Incorrect Privilege Assignment vulnerability in Hippoo Mobile App for WooCommerce allows Privilege Escalation. This issue affects Hippoo Mobile App for WooCommerce: from n/a through 1.9.4.

item.title: CVE-2023-32959 · 4.3 MEDIUM — WordPress MetroStore theme <= 1.3.2 - Broken Access Control
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Sparkle WP MetroStore metrostore allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects MetroStore: from n/a through 1.3.2.

item.title: CVE-2022-47150 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress WooCommerce Conversion Tracking plugin <= 2.0.10 - Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability
item.description: Cross-Site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in weDevs WooCommerce Conversion Tracking allows Cross Site Request Forgery. This issue affects WooCommerce Conversion Tracking: from n/a through 2.0.10.

item.title: CVE-2022-45813 · 5.4 MEDIUM — WordPress Advanced AJAX Product Filters plugin <= 1.6.3.3 - Broken Access Control + CSRF
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in BeRocket Advanced AJAX Product Filters allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Advanced AJAX Product Filters: from n/a through 1.6.3.3.

item.title: CVE-2022-44630 · 4.6 MEDIUM — WordPress YITH WooCommerce Product Slider Carousel plugin <= 1.16.0 - Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
item.description: Cross-Site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in YITH YITH WooCommerce Product Slider Carousel allows Cross Site Request Forgery. This issue affects YITH WooCommerce Product Slider Carousel: from n/a through 1.16.0.

item.title: CVE-2022-42479 · 5.4 MEDIUM — WordPress Soledad premium theme <= 8.2.5 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in TemplateHouse Soledad allows Accessing Functionality Not Properly Constrained by ACLs. This issue affects Soledad: from n/a through 8.2.5.

item.title: CVE-2023-40200 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress WP Logo Showcase Responsive Slider and Carousel plugin <= 3.6 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Authorization bypass through User-Controlled key vulnerability in Essential Plugin WP Logo Showcase Responsive Slider and Carousel allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects WP Logo Showcase Responsive…

item.title: CVE-2024-32110 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress Event Manager and Tickets Selling Plugin for WooCommerce plugin <= 4.1.2 - Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability
item.description: Cross-Site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Magepeople inc. WpEvently allows Cross Site Request Forgery. This issue affects WpEvently: from n/a through 4.1.2.

item.title: CVE-2023-33999 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress WP Mail Log plugin <= 1.0.2 - Reflected Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in WPVibes WP Mail Log allows DOM-Based XSS. This issue affects WP Mail Log: from n/a through 1.0.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-49069 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress WPZOOM Portfolio plugin <= 1.4.21 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in WPZOOM Portfolio allows Reflected XSS. This issue affects WPZOOM Portfolio: from n/a through 1.4.21.

item.title: CVE-2026-49777 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress Product Slider Pro for WooCommerce plugin < 3.5.3 - Backdoor vulnerability
item.description: Improper Validation of Specified Quantity in Input vulnerability in ShapedPlugin, LLC Product Slider Pro for WooCommerce allows Malicious Software Implanted. This issue affects Product Slider Pro for WooCommerce: from n/a before 3.5.3. No patched ver…

item.title: CVE-2026-49077 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress WP eMember plugin <= v10.2.2 - Sensitive Data Exposure vulnerability
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive System Information to an Unauthorized Control Sphere vulnerability in Tips and Tricks HQ WP eMember allows Retrieve Embedded Sensitive Data. This issue affects WP eMember: from n/a through v10.2.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-49771 · 7.6 HIGH — WordPress Photo Gallery by 10Web plugin <= 1.8.41 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in 10Web Photo Gallery by 10Web allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects Photo Gallery by 10Web: from n/a through 1.8.41.

item.title: CVE-2025-15656 · 8.8 HIGH — WordPress School Management plugin <= 93.2.0 - Privilege Escalation vulnerability
item.description: Incorrect Privilege Assignment vulnerability in Mojoomla School Management allows Privilege Escalation. This issue affects School Management: from n/a through 93.2.0.

item.title: CVE-2025-15655 · 7.6 HIGH — WordPress School Management plugin <= 93.2.0 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Mojoomla School Management allows SQL Injection. This issue affects School Management: from n/a through 93.2.0.

item.title: CVE-2025-15654 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Prague plugin <= 2.2.8 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Fox-themes Prague allows Reflected XSS. This issue affects Prague: from n/a through 2.2.8.

item.title: CVE-2026-40780 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress BookIt plugin < 2.5.4.1 - Broken Authentication vulnerability
item.description: Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel vulnerability in Liquid Web / StellarWP BookIt allows Password Recovery Exploitation. This issue affects BookIt: from n/a before 2.5.4.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-42654 · 7.1 HIGH — WordPress Wallet System for WooCommerce plugin <= 2.7.5 - Broken Authentication vulnerability
item.description: Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel vulnerability in WP Swings Wallet System for WooCommerce allows Password Recovery Exploitation. This issue affects Wallet System for WooCommerce: from n/a through 2.7.5.

item.title: CVE-2026-49782 · 5.4 MEDIUM — WordPress Elementor Website Builder plugin <= 4.1.0 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Elementor Elementor Website Builder allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Elementor Website Builder: from n/a through 4.1.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-27351 · 5.4 MEDIUM — WordPress Crew HRM plugin <= 1.2.2 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Sekander Badsha Crew HRM allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Crew HRM: from n/a through 1.2.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-28116 · 5.9 MEDIUM — WordPress Progress Planner plugin <= 1.9.0 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Emilia Projects Progress Planner allows Stored XSS. This issue affects Progress Planner: from n/a through 1.9.0.

item.title: CVE-2025-68886 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Cookiteer theme <= 1.4.8 - Local File Inclusion vulnerability
item.description: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion') vulnerability in androThemes Cookiteer allows PHP Local File Inclusion. This issue affects Cookiteer: from n/a through 1.4.8.

item.title: CVE-2025-69369 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Racquet theme <= 1.12.0 - Local File Inclusion vulnerability
item.description: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion') vulnerability in Axiomthemes Racquet allows PHP Local File Inclusion. This issue affects Racquet: from n/a through 1.12.0.

item.title: CVE-2025-58897 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Fermentio theme <= 1.5.0 - Local File Inclusion vulnerability
item.description: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion') vulnerability in Axiomthemes Fermentio allows PHP Local File Inclusion. This issue affects Fermentio: from n/a through 1.5.0.

item.title: CVE-2025-58707 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Spin theme <= 1.8 - Local File Inclusion vulnerability
item.description: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion') vulnerability in Axiomthemes Spin allows PHP Local File Inclusion. This issue affects Spin: from n/a through 1.8.

item.title: CVE-2026-39555 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Askka theme <= 1.3.1 - PHP Object Injection vulnerability
item.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in Elated-Themes Askka allows Object Injection. This issue affects Askka: from n/a through 1.3.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-39553 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress WaveRide theme <= 1.4 - Local File Inclusion vulnerability
item.description: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion') vulnerability in Select-Themes WaveRide allows PHP Local File Inclusion. This issue affects WaveRide: from n/a through 1.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-39552 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Blueprint theme < 1.1.5 - Local File Inclusion vulnerability
item.description: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion') vulnerability in Code Supply Co. Blueprint allows PHP Local File Inclusion. This issue affects Blueprint: from n/a before 1.1.5.

item.title: CVE-2026-39551 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Töbel theme <= 1.8.1 - PHP Object Injection vulnerability
item.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in Elated-Themes Töbel allows Object Injection. This issue affects Töbel: from n/a through 1.8.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-39550 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Aperitif theme <= 1.6 - PHP Object Injection vulnerability
item.description: Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability in Elated-Themes Aperitif allows Object Injection. This issue affects Aperitif: from n/a through 1.6.

item.title: CVE-2026-42685 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress WP Job Portal plugin <= 2.5.1 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Ahmad WP Job Portal allows Reflected XSS. This issue affects WP Job Portal: from n/a through 2.5.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-42684 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress WP Job Portal plugin <= 2.5.1 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Ahmad WP Job Portal allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects WP Job Portal: from n/a through 2.5.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-42670 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Five Star Restaurant Reservations plugin <= 2.7.14 - Payment Bypass vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Etoile Web Design Incorporated Five Star Restaurant Reservations allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Five Star Restaurant Reservations: from n/a through 2.…

item.title: CVE-2026-42669 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress EventPrime plugin <= 4.3.2.0 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in EventPrime allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects EventPrime: from n/a through 4.3.2.0.

item.title: CVE-2025-58705 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Crafti theme <= 1.12 - Local File Inclusion vulnerability
item.description: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion') vulnerability in Axiomthemes Crafti allows PHP Local File Inclusion. This issue affects Crafti: from n/a through 1.12.

item.title: CVE-2025-58024 · 7.5 HIGH — WordPress Accordion FAQ Plugin <= 2.2.1 - Local File Inclusion Vulnerability
item.description: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion') vulnerability in UnboundStudio Accordion FAQ allows PHP Local File Inclusion. This issue affects Accordion FAQ: from n/a through 2.2.1.

item.title: CVE-2025-53440 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Confidant theme <= 1.4 - Local File Inclusion vulnerability
item.description: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion') vulnerability in Axiomthemes Confidant allows PHP Local File Inclusion. This issue affects Confidant: from n/a through 1.4.

item.title: CVE-2025-53346 · 4.3 MEDIUM — WordPress Thim Core Plugin <= 2.3.3 - Broken Access Control Vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in ThimPress Thim Core allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Thim Core: from n/a through 2.3.3.

item.title: CVE-2025-53345 · 8.8 HIGH — WordPress Thim Core plugin <= 2.3.3 - Arbitrary Plugin Installation vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability leading to code execution after installing malicious vulnerable plugin in ThimPress Thim Core. This issue affects Thim Core: from n/a through 2.3.3.

item.title: CVE-2025-53302 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress Constructor theme <= 1.6.5 - Broken Access Control Vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Anton Shevchuk Constructor allows Accessing Functionality Not Properly Constrained by ACLs. This issue affects Constructor: from n/a through 1.6.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-53209 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress Masteriyo LMS PRO plugin <= 2.20.0 - Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
item.description: Incorrect Privilege Assignment vulnerability in Themeisle Masteriyo LMS PRO allows Privilege Escalation. This issue affects Masteriyo LMS PRO: from n/a through 2.20.0.

item.title: CVE-2025-52766 · 6.5 MEDIUM — WordPress Printeers Print & Ship plugin <= 1.17.0 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Printeers Printeers Print & Ship allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Printeers Print & Ship: from n/a through 1.17.0.

item.title: CVE-2025-52759 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Accordion FAQ plugin <= 2.2.1 - Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in UnboundStudio Accordion FAQ allows Reflected XSS. This issue affects Accordion FAQ: from n/a through 2.2.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-42671 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — WordPress GeoDirectory plugin <= 2.8.157 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Paolo GeoDirectory allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects GeoDirectory: from n/a through 2.8.157.

item.title: CVE-2026-42672 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — WordPress WP Directory Kit plugin <= 1.5.1 - SQL Injection vulnerability
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Wp Directory Kit WP Directory Kit allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects WP Directory Kit: from n/a through 1.5.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-42673 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Activity Logs, User Activity Tracking, Multisite Activity Log from Logtivity plugin <= 3.3.6 - Sensitive Data Exposure vulnerability
item.description: Insertion of Sensitive Information Into Sent Data vulnerability in Logtivity Activity Logs Activity Logs, User Activity Tracking, Multisite Activity Log from Logtivity allows Retrieve Embedded Sensitive Data. This issue affects Activity Logs, User Ac…

item.title: CVE-2026-42674 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — WordPress Advanced Access Manager plugin <= 7.1.0 - Bypass Vulnerability vulnerability
item.description: Authentication Bypass by Spoofing vulnerability in AAM Plugin Advanced Access Manager allows URL Encoding. This issue affects Advanced Access Manager: from n/a through 7.1.0.
